name: sprout-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Sprout Social analytics, publishing, listening, messages, and cases.

sprout_api_token.title: Sprout API Token
sprout_api_token.description: API token from Sprout Social API Token Management. Use this or OAuth credentials.

sprout_client_id.title: Sprout OAuth Client ID
sprout_client_id.description: OAuth client ID. Used for M2M auth and for interactive 'Sign in with Sprout' (run 'npm run login'). Optional if using an API token.

sprout_client_secret.title: Sprout OAuth Client Secret
sprout_client_secret.description: OAuth client secret. Required only for M2M auth. NOT needed for interactive 'Sign in with Sprout', which uses PKCE.

sprout_org_id.title: Sprout Organization ID
sprout_org_id.description: Organization ID for OAuth machine-to-machine authentication.

sprout_customer_id.title: Sprout Customer ID
sprout_customer_id.description: Optional customer ID when the token has access to multiple customers.
